description_long: This object consists of three main battle tanks positioned side by side, each featuring a large, elongated cannon barrel mounted on a rotating turret. The tanks are heavily armored with angular, modular plating covering the hull and turret, and each has visible external fuel drums attached to the rear. The tanks display distinct camouflage paint schemes: one in desert tan, one in woodland brown, and one in blue-gray urban tones, with each pattern composed of irregular, blocky shapes. The upper surfaces are equipped with various hatches, periscopes, and antennae, and the tracks are wide and robust, designed for traversing rough terrain. The tanks' turrets are fitted with additional weapon mounts, including machine guns and smoke grenade launchers, and the overall build is low and wide, emphasizing protection and firepower.
description: A trio of heavily armored main battle tanks with large cannons, modular plating, and distinct camouflage patterns in tan, brown, and blue-gray. Each tank features external fuel drums, wide tracks, and multiple weapon mounts.
description_view_0: Front view showing three tanks side by side, highlighting their angular armor, large cannons, and distinct camouflage patterns.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the length of the tanks, the full extension of the cannons, and the external fuel drums mounted at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the back armor, external fuel drums, and the symmetry of the tanks' design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tanks' tracks, side armor, and the arrangement of the turrets and barrels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Each tank has one main cannon mounted on the turret and at least one visible machine gun mount on the turret roof; additional mounts for smoke grenade launchers are present on the turret sides.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular, modular armor plating on the hull and turret; sloped and reinforced panels are visible, especially on the front and sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Distinct camouflage patterns: one in tan and beige (desert), one in brown and green (woodland), and one in blue-gray and gray (urban), all with irregular, blocky shapes.
